urdu transliteration text: Surae Kahf Sunata Hai Ye Sar Kiska Hai
english translation text: Reciting Surah Kahf, whose head is this?

urdu transliteration text: Khoon Ankho Se Bahata Hai.Ye Sar Kiska Hai
english translation text: Crying tears of blood, whose head is this?

Chalte Chalte Jo Sakina (S.a.) Kahi Gir Jati Hai
Whenever Sakina falls while she is walking

urdu transliteration text: Khudko Naize Se Girata Hai. Ye Sar Kiska Hai
english translation text: It throws itself off the spear, whose head is this?

Jis Taraf Jata Hai Bazar Me Sar Akbar (A.s.) Ka
Whichever way the head of Akbar goes in the bazaar,

urdu transliteration text: Us Taraf Dekhta Jata Hai. Ye Sar Kiska Hai
english translation text: It keeps looking that way, whose head is this?

urdu transliteration text: Raat Hoti Hai To Masoom Si Ek Bachi Ko
english translation text: When it becomes dark, to this little innocent girl

urdu transliteration text: Lori Naize Se Sunata Hai Ye Sar Kiska Hai
english translation text: It sings lullabies from the top of the spear, whose head is this?

urdu transliteration text: Ye Sama Kaash Na Dekhe Koi Khwahar Iski
english translation text: If only any sister of his was not present to see this moment

urdu transliteration text: Shimr (L.a.) Zulfo Se Uthata Hai Ye Sar Kiska Hai
english translation text: Shimr is picking it up by its hair, whose head is this?
